channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Letters Highlight Concerns Over Ontario's Fast-Tracked FOI Changes
item.description: The Globe and Mail's letters section on April 26 featured various reader contributions, with one focusing on the Ontario government's proposed changes to freedom-of-information (FOI) laws. Jerome Daly...

item.title: Ciza dominates at Metro FM Music Awards, scooping Best Male and Artist of the Year
item.description: Ciza, the talented hit-maker behind 'Isaka', emerged as the big winner at the 20th Metro FM Music Awards held at the Durban ICC. He took home two prestigious awards: Best Male and Artist of the Year. ...

item.title: Pakistan: Government Seeks to Simplify Solar Energy Adoption
item.description: The Power Division in Pakistan has formally requested the National Electric Power Regulatory Authority (Nepra) to abolish the requirement for licenses and associated fees for consumers installing sola...

item.title: NCC Begins Automatic Airtime Payouts for Poor Network Service
item.description: Na so the NCC don start automatic airtime compensation for Nigerians wey dey suffer network wahala for MTN, Airtel, Glo, and 9mobile. From April 2026, if your area (LGA) experience network failure, li...

item.title: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 Highlights Emerging AI, Robotics, and Resilience Innovations
item.description: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 is positioning itself as a leading technology event by focusing on four clearly defined areas: AI, robotics, urban resilience, and entertainment. The conference emphasizes practi...

item.title: AAP petitions Rajya Sabha to disqualify seven MPs who joined BJP
item.description: The Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) has formally approached the Rajya Sabha chairman, Vice President CP Radhakrishnan, requesting the disqualification of seven MPs who recently left the party and joined the Bha...

item.title: LA Students Receive Free Prom Dresses and Tuxedos at Annual Giveaway Event
item.description: Hundreds of high school students from across Los Angeles County attended the 10th Annual Prom Dress & Tux Gift-Away and Resource Fair at the Sheraton Gateway Los Angeles Hotel on April 25, 2026. Hoste...

item.title: Supporters of Ben Roberts-Smith gather for public rally in Melbourne
item.description: Supporters of former Australian soldier Ben Roberts-Smith took to the streets of Melbourne to publicly demonstrate their support. The rally comes amid ongoing public and legal attention surrounding Ro...

item.title: How Egypt and Kenya Are Strengthening Regional Cooperation and Development in Africa
item.description: This opinion piece highlights how Kenya and Egypt have built a strong and strategic partnership that goes beyond normal diplomacy, positioning themselves as key players in Africa’s integration and dev...

item.title: Global Nuclear Power Usage Increasing Despite Historical Accidents
item.description: Forty years after the Chernobyl disaster, nuclear power is experiencing a global resurgence. The recent geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, along with the need for low-carbon energy sources, hav...

item.title: Queen Camilla presents a newly made Roo toy to New York Public Library to complete Winnie-the-Pooh display
item.description: During her state visit to the United States, Queen Camilla will deliver a specially crafted Roo toy to the New York Public Library, completing the original Winnie-the-Pooh collection. The toys, which ...

item.title: Table Mountain summit now accessible to all with new universal walkway
item.description: Table Mountain has recently unveiled a new Universal Access Walkway at its summit, making it easier for everyone to enjoy the breathtaking views safely and comfortably. Developed in partnership betwee...

item.title: Triumph Shines on 50th-Anniversary Tour While April Wine Performs Without Original Members
item.description: Triumph, the iconic Canadian rock trio, returned to the stage for their 50th-anniversary tour with a show full of energy, technical precision, and nostalgia. Original members Gil Moore and Rik Emmett ...

item.title: George Ruto Claps Back at Online Threats Over His Matatus
item.description: George Ruto, son of Kenyan President William Ruto, recently responded to online criticism and threats regarding his matatu business. Known for keeping a low profile on social media, George had publicl...

item.title: 2PM's Ok Taec-yeon Marries Longtime Partner
item.description: Korean pop star Ok Taec-yeon, a member of the beloved group 2PM, has officially tied the knot with his longtime partner. The announcement, made on April 26, 2026, has sent waves of excitement and well...

item.title: Trump and First Lady Evacuated Safely During Shooting at White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: Donald and Melania Trump were evacuated from the White House correspondents’ dinner on Saturday evening after gunfire broke out at the Washington Hilton. The suspect, identified as 31-year-old Cole To...

item.title: NNPP Leader Ringim Joins ADC to Strengthen Opposition in Jigawa
item.description: As things stand, top chieftain of the New Nigeria Peoples Party (NNPP) for Jigawa State, Aminu Ibrahim Ringim, don officially join di African Democratic Congress (ADC). Him do dis because him wan help...

item.title: Heatwave in Delhi: Orange alert issued, temperatures to stay high for 3 days
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued an orange alert for Delhi due to a severe heatwave that will persist for three more days. With temperatures expected to soar between 43°C and 45°C,...

item.title: Charlize Theron talks about her mother's self-defense against her father
item.description: In a candid interview, Charlize Theron opened up about a traumatic event from her childhood, explaining how her mother once shot her father in self-defense. Theron described the situation as a despera...

item.title: Match highlights from Newcastle Knights vs Penrith Panthers in NRL Round 8
item.description: This item refers to a highlights package from the 2026 NRL Premiership clash between the Newcastle Knights and the Penrith Panthers, played at McDonald Jones Stadium in Newcastle. Rather than a full w...
